title: Shares of Jeep maker Stellantis fall as much as 10% after first-quarter results
summary_full: The multinational conglomerate posted first-quarter adjusted operating income of 960 million euros ($1.12 billion), comfortably beating analyst expectations.
summary_public: The multinational conglomerate posted first-quarter adjusted operating income of 960 million euros ($1.12 billion), comfortably beating analyst expectations.
